# Solvia

> Solvia helps doctors, nurses, and healthcare professionals get their medical license recognized in Germany, Austria, and Spain. We provide step-by-step homologation guidance, verified job listings, visa support, and language learning resources.

## About

Solvia is a platform based in Salzburg, Austria, that guides international medical professionals through the complex process of getting their qualifications recognized in Europe. Our services include personalized document checklists, AI-powered document review, verified hospital job listings, and mentorship from doctors who have successfully completed the process.

## Core Services

- [Homologation Guide](https://solvia-flexkapg.lovable.app/homologation): Step-by-step medical license recognition process for Germany, Austria, and Spain
- [Medical Jobs](https://solvia-flexkapg.lovable.app/vacancies): Verified doctor and nurse positions in European hospitals
- [Visa Information](https://solvia-flexkapg.lovable.app/visa-info): Visa requirements and application guidance for healthcare workers
- [Learning Center](https://solvia-flexkapg.lovable.app/learning): German language courses and FSP exam preparation
- [Blog](https://solvia-flexkapg.lovable.app/blog): Expert articles on medical career migration to Europe

## Key Topics

- Medical license recognition (Approbation) in Germany
- Homologación de título médico in Spain
- Nostrifizierung in Austria
- Kenntnisprüfung and FSP exam preparation
- Healthcare worker visa processes
- German language learning for doctors (B2/C1 medical German)
- Document apostille and translation requirements
- Working as a doctor or nurse in Europe

## Languages

Content is available in English, German, French, Spanish, and Russian.

- Website: https://solvia-flexkapg.lovable.app
- Email: David.rehrl@thesolvia.com
